item.description:
PGA TOUR reposteó Golfbet @Golfbet · 15min Ludvig Aberg fires a 63 to take the solo lead at 8-under @RBC_Heritage . That +3000 First Round Leader ticket may be the play of the day

LIV Golf and the Public Investment Fund of Saudi Ara
item.description:
Monday Q Info reposteó Amar Mehta @Amarjournalist_ · 2h Breaking:
LIV Golf and the Public Investment Fund of Saudi Arabia have been sued by Premier Golf League in the Commercial Court.
#LIVGolf
More on @SkySportsNews 5 48 225 103 mil
